name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  lint:
    name: Lint & Syntax Check
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up Python 3.11
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"
      - name: Check Python syntax
        run: python -m py_compile skills.py
      - name: Verify AST parse
        run: python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('skills.py').read()); print('OK')"
